title: Migraine follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped focal-neurological, pattern-change, vomiting, and clinician-led imaging fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.

source_limitations: People younger than 12 years are outside the exact source.

Detailed neurological, cranial-nerve, blood-pressure, and fundoscopy fields, blood tests, lifestyle, bridge therapy, supplements, generic clinician plans, telemedicine, and fixed follow-up intervals remain unsupported.
Medicine choice, dose, contraindications, imaging interpretation, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
